display.purpose: Hero headline and major brand moments. Playfair Display, ceiling ~3.75rem.

headline.purpose: Section titles. Playfair Display, text-wrap: balance.

title.purpose: Card titles, product names, value-prop headings. Nunito 800 — never Playfair.

body.purpose: Paragraphs and helper text. Nunito, 65–75ch measure, Charcoal.

label.purpose: Badges and small functional labels. Nunito 900.

shadows.name: soft-ambient
shadows.purpose: Hero brand panel, trust seal, sticky header — true brand focal points only.

shadows.name: hairline
shadows.purpose: Default content cards; the taupe border does the real separation.

motion.name: ui-transition
motion.purpose: Default for background-color, border-color, color, and transform on links/buttons.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The request action — 'Request a booking', 'Continue on WhatsApp'. Marrakech Red, white text, fully pill.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 2.875rem; padding: 0.8rem 1.15rem; border: none; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--color-primary, #b94a48); color: #fff; font-family: Nunito, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; line-height: 1.2; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 160ms ease, transform 160ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #9f3d3b; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #9f3d3b; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Quieter action — 'Chat on WhatsApp'. Translucent white with taupe border; never a payment CTA.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 2.875rem; padding: 0.8rem 1.15rem; border: 1px solid rgb(168 158 148 / 0.45); border-radius: 999px; background: rgb(255 255 255 / 0.75); color: #333; font-family: Nunito, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; line-height: 1.2; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 160ms ease, color 160ms ease, transform 160ms ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: #b94a48; color: #b94a48; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #b94a48; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Service Badge
components.description: Availability / service state — always carries a text label, never color-only.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 0.4rem 0.7rem; border-radius: 999px; background: rgb(185 74 72 / 0.1); color: #b94a48; font-family: Nunito, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 900; line-height: 1.2; }

components.name: Sage Badge
components.description: Organic / premium-consumable cue only — used sparingly on Welcome Kits.
components.css: .ds-badge-sage { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 0.4rem 0.7rem; border-radius: 999px; background: rgb(143 161 138 / 0.18); color: #506549; font-family: Nunito, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 900; line-height: 1.2; }

components.name: Content Card
components.description: Default content surface — value props, steps, products. Flat with a hairline shadow and taupe border. Never nest cards.
components.html:
Request to book

Travel cot

From 60 MAD/day. Cleaned, checked, and prepared before delivery.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid rgb(168 158 148 / 0.28); border-radius: 16px; padding: 1.25rem; box-shadow: 0 1px 0 rgb(51 51 51 / 0.03); } .ds-card .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 0.4rem 0.7rem; border-radius: 999px; background: rgb(185 74 72 / 0.1); color: #b94a48; font-family: Nunito, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 900; } .ds-card-title { margin: 1.25rem 0 0; font-family: Nunito, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 800; color: #333; } .ds-card-copy { margin: 0.75rem 0 0; font-family: Nunito, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.5; color: rgb(51 51 51 / 0.72); }

components.name: Category Tile
components.description: Light, tappable entry point into the catalogue. Pill, white, taupe border.
components.css: .ds-tile { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 0.75rem 0.95rem; border: 1px solid rgb(168 158 148 / 0.28); border-radius: 999px; background: #fff; color: #333; font-family: Nunito, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.92rem; font-weight: 800; transition: border-color 160ms ease, color 160ms ease; } .ds-tile:hover { border-color: #b94a48; color: #b94a48; }

components.name: Step Number
components.description: Numbered marker for the How-It-Works sequence — legitimate because the steps are a real ordered flow.
components.css: .ds-step { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 2.5rem; height: 2.5rem; border-radius: 999px; background: #b94a48; color: #fff; font-family: Nunito, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 900; }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Header navigation link. Nunito 800, muted charcoal, hover to red.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { color: rgb(51 51 51 / 0.75); font-family: Nunito, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; text-decoration: none; transition: color 160ms ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #b94a48; } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #b94a48; outline-offset: 2px; border-radius: 4px; }

narrative.overview: Hababy & Co should feel like walking into a calm, sunlit Rabat home where everything a family needs has already been cleaned, checked, and set out — before they arrived. The interface does the emotional work of lowering a tired parent's heart rate: warm off-white walls, soft sand-toned bands, generous air, and exactly one confident red voice that points to the next step. Nothing shouts; the premium signal is care, not luxury ornament. It rejects the marketplace, the toy shop, the SaaS dashboard, the gold-edged boutique, and the souvenir-stall tile. Moroccan heritage lives here as sense of place, never as decoration on top. The request-first model is presented as a feature: a real person is preparing this for your family.
keyCharacteristics: Warm off-white canvas (#fbf7f1) with soft sand bands (#ead7c3) for sectioning — never stark white pages.
One bold voice: Marrakech Red (#b94a48) reserved for actions and key highlights only.
Editorial Playfair Display headings over practical Nunito body and UI.
Soft, generously-rounded surfaces; flat by default with one diffuse shadow for true brand moments.
Mobile-first, touch-first, calm — large tap targets, roomy spacing, no visual pressure.

rules.name: The One Red Voice Rule
rules.body: Marrakech Red carries actions and key highlights only. If two unrelated things on a screen are red, one of them is wrong. Warmth elsewhere comes from sand, rose, type, and imagery — never from spreading the accent.

rules.name: The Fills-Are-Not-Text Rule
rules.body: Rose Dust and Sand are never used as text on white — they fail contrast and read as washed-out. Taupe is for borders and captions, never running body copy. Body text is Charcoal, full stop.

rules.name: The Playfair-Is-For-Moments Rule
rules.body: Playfair Display appears at large sizes for headings and brand moments only. Small UI labels, helper text, dense product info, prices, forms, and admin tables are always Nunito. A serif price tag is a tell.

rules.name: The Script-Is-A-Garnish Rule
rules.body: Quicker Script is a single decorative word at most ('welcome home'), never a headline, price, button, label, or sentence. When in doubt, don't.

rules.name: The Border-Before-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Separation comes from the 1px taupe border and the tonal background shift first. Reach for Soft Ambient only when an element is a true brand focal point — never to make an ordinary card pop.

dos: Do keep the page on warm off-white (#fbf7f1) and section with sand bands (#ead7c3) — never stark white full pages.
Do reserve Marrakech Red for actions and key highlights only (The One Red Voice Rule).
Do set body copy in Charcoal at ≥4.5:1 contrast; verify ink/72-style opacities still pass before shipping them.
Do use Playfair for headings/brand moments and Nunito for everything functional.
Do keep surfaces flat with a 1px taupe border; reserve the Soft Ambient shadow for true brand focal points.
Do give every interactive element a visible focus state and a prefers-reduced-motion fallback (WCAG 2.1 AA).
Do keep Moroccan inspiration subtle — the star mark and earthen warmth, not tiled backgrounds.
Do make availability and deposits explicit; clarity is the premium signal.
donts: Don't use Rose Dust, Sand, or Taupe as text on white — fills and borders only; body text is Charcoal.
Don't make it look like a generic rental marketplace, a cartoonish toy shop, a cold SaaS dashboard / hero-metric template, a gold-edged luxury boutique, or a busy Moroccan-souvenir tile background.
Don't put a tiny uppercase tracked eyebrow above every section — find a different cadence.
Don't nest a card inside a card (the current hero stacks card-in-card — rework toward a single calm surface).
Don't use border-left/border-right colored side-stripes, gradient text, or decorative glassmorphism — ever.
Don't spread Marrakech Red across multiple unrelated elements on one screen.
Don't use checkout / payment language ('Book now', 'Buy now', 'Pay now', 'Instant checkout') or make availability feel uncertain.
Don't overuse Quicker Script, or set Playfair at small functional sizes.
